name: specshift
description: Spec-driven development workflow for Codex: research, specs, design, quality checks, changelogs, and user docs alongside code.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven workflow for planning, implementation, verification, and review
interface.longDescription: Use SpecShift to guide Codex through a structured change lifecycle: research, proposal, specs, design, preflight checks, tests, tasks, audit, finalization, and PR review.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecShift to propose a new change.
